requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240V / 50Hz / Type-G Plug (IEC 62368-1 via UNBS)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——240V / 50Hz / G型插头（UNBS采用IEC 62368-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——240V / 50Hz / G型插頭（UNBS採用IEC 62368-1）

summary.en: Uganda operates on 240V / 50Hz mains supply and uses the British standard type-G three-pin square plug (BS 1363). Electrical safety for audio/video and information technology equipment (including wireless IoT devices) is assessed against IEC 62368-1:2023 as adopted by UNBS. Products must be designed and tested for 240V/50Hz input; a type-G plug or compatible power supply/adaptor is required for Uganda's socket infrastructure. Chinese factory default of 220V/50Hz with type-A/I plugs requires adaptation for Uganda. UNBS market surveillance may require evidence of IEC 62368-1 compliance.
summary.zh: 乌干达市电为240V / 50Hz，使用英国标准G型三孔方形插头（BS 1363）。音视频及信息技术设备（含无线物联网设备）的电气安全依据UNBS采用的IEC 62368-1:2023进行评估。产品须针对240V/50Hz输入进行设计和测试；乌干达的插座基础设施要求使用G型插头或兼容电源/适配器。中国工厂默认的220V/50Hz和A/I型插头须为乌干达市场进行适配。UNBS市场监督可能要求提供IEC 62368-1合规证据。
summary.zht: 烏干達市電為240V / 50Hz，使用英國標準G型三孔方形插頭（BS 1363）。音視頻及信息技術設備（含無線物聯網裝置）的電氣安全依據UNBS採用的IEC 62368-1:2023進行評估。產品須針對240V/50Hz輸入進行設計和測試；烏干達的插座基礎設施要求使用G型插頭或兼容電源/適配器。中國工廠默認的220V/50Hz和A/I型插頭須為烏干達市場進行適配。UNBS市場監督可能要求提供IEC 62368-1合規證據。

standards_or_laws: BS 1363 (Type-G plug and socket-outlet; adopted by Uganda)
Uganda Standards (US) — IEC adoptions via UNBS

summary.en: China electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 62368-1 for new products) under the CCC mandatory certification scheme. Chinese products are designed for 220V/50Hz with type-A or type-I plugs per GB/T 1002 and GB/T 2099. The CCC certificate to GB 4943.1 provides a baseline for IEC 62368-1 compliance but the voltage rating (220V vs 240V), plug type (A/I vs G), and the Chinese-only certification mark are not accepted in Uganda without adaptation.
summary.zh: 中国IT及音视频设备电气安全受强制性产品认证（CCC）体系下的GB 4943.1（新产品已与IEC 62368-1对应）管辖。中国产品按GB/T 1002和GB/T 2099设计为220V/50Hz及A型或I型插头。GB 4943.1 CCC证书为IEC 62368-1合规提供基础，但电压额定值（220V vs 240V）、插头类型（A/I型 vs G型）及仅限中国的认证标志在乌干达均不被接受，须进行适配。
summary.zht: 中國IT及音視頻設備電氣安全受強制性產品認證（CCC）體系下的GB 4943.1（新產品已與IEC 62368-1對應）管轄。中國產品按GB/T 1002和GB/T 2099設計為220V/50Hz及A型或I型插頭。GB 4943.1 CCC證書為IEC 62368-1合規提供基礎，但電壓額定值（220V vs 240V）、插頭類型（A/I型 vs G型）及僅限中國的認證標誌在烏干達均不被接受，須進行適配。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (IT equipment safety; aligned with IEC 62368-1)
CCC mandatory certification (IT equipment, AV equipment)
GB/T 1002-2008 / GB/T 2099.1-2008 (China type-A and type-I plugs and sockets)

gap.en: Three gaps must be addressed for Uganda: (1) voltage rating — products designed for 220V must be rated or re-tested for 240V operation; (2) plug type — type-A or type-I plugs used in China are incompatible with Uganda's type-G sockets; a type-G power cord or a dual-voltage adaptor with type-G plug must be supplied; (3) certification citation — CCC under GB 4943.1 is not a recognised safety mark in Uganda; IEC 62368-1 test evidence from an accredited laboratory is required to support UNBS market surveillance and UCC type approval dossiers.
gap.zh: 乌干达市场须处理三项差距：（1）电压额定值——为220V设计的产品须额定或重新测试以适应240V运行；（2）插头类型——中国使用的A型或I型插头与乌干达G型插座不兼容，须随附G型电源线或带G型插头的双电压适配器；（3）认证引用——GB 4943.1下的CCC认证在乌干达不被认可为安全标志，须提供认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1测试证据，以支持UNBS市场监督和UCC型式批准申请。
gap.zht: 烏干達市場須處理三項差距：（1）電壓額定值——為220V設計的產品須額定或重新測試以適應240V運行；（2）插頭類型——中國使用的A型或I型插頭與烏干達G型插座不兼容，須隨附G型電源線或帶G型插頭的雙電壓適配器；（3）認證引用——GB 4943.1下的CCC認證在烏干達不被認可為安全標誌，須提供認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1測試證據，以支持UNBS市場監督和UCC型式批准申請。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda uses 240V/50Hz and type-G plugs. China-made devices designed for 220V/50Hz with type-A/I plugs require voltage rating verification, a type-G power interface, and IEC 62368-1 test evidence from an accredited laboratory to satisfy UNBS electrical safety requirements. CCC under GB 4943.1 is not a recognised safety approval in Uganda.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达使用240V/50Hz和G型插头。为220V/50Hz及A/I型插头设计的中国设备须进行电压额定值验证、配备G型电源接口，并提供认可实验室出具的IEC 62368-1测试证据，以满足UNBS电气安全要求。GB 4943.1下的CCC认证在乌干达不被认可为安全批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達使用240V/50Hz和G型插頭。為220V/50Hz及A/I型插頭設計的中國設備須進行電壓額定值驗證、配備G型電源接口，並提供認可實驗室出具的IEC 62368-1測試證據，以滿足UNBS電氣安全要求。GB 4943.1下的CCC認證在烏干達不被認可為安全批准。
